Muirenn.Toddler.Dialog.Mon: Do you think Gunther can get me a cool book about space?#$b#Miss Maru let me look through her telescope yesterday...I wanna know more about stars now.$1
Muirenn.Toddler.Dialog.Tue: If I want to be as cool as you and papa I have to do my utmost best every day!#$b#But that doesn't mean I can't slack here and there, ehehe.#$b#I mean, there gotta be time to catch tadpoles, right?
Muirenn.Toddler.Dialog.Wed: I went to the lake in the forest to watch the little fishies swim around.#$b#Jas was there too and I skipped rope with her.
Muirenn.Toddler.Dialog.Thu: I wanted to sleep in but papa said that bad habits can start really easy and are very hard to get rid of...#$b#...I guess he is right. Well, more time to run around and have fun!$1
Muirenn.Toddler.Dialog.Fri: ...maybe I will take things slow today.#$b#A day of drawing and crafting does sound nice. I did collect quite a few seashells afterall!
Muirenn.Toddler.Dialog.Sat: I helped with the chores today! Papa said that if I did I can go with Miss Penny and the other kids to the museum!
Muirenn.Toddler.Dialog.Sun: Don't be mad but I think papa overdid it with raising the water level again...maybe we can switch to rice paddies?
Muirenn.Toddler.Gift.Loved: Oh! I love this so much!$1
Muirenn.Toddler.Gift.Liked: Thank you, I like this a lot!
Muirenn.Toddler.Gift.Hated: Was I a bad kid?$2#$b#Why are you giving me this?$2
Muirenn.MovieInvite_Invited: Yay! I can't wait to watch the movie!$1
Muirenn.Movie.With_Parent_Before: What did you pick?#$b#I love doing things with you!$1
Muirenn.Movie.With_Parent_Script: %%kid1 keeps looking over to you to see your reaction.
Muirenn.Movie.With_Parent_After: This was fun! Let's do it again. $1
Muirenn.Movie.love_Before: I saw what the movie was about, I can't wait to see it.
Muirenn.Movie.love_After: This was great! Can we watch it again?
Muirenn.Movie.like_Before: Do you think the movie will be good?
Muirenn.Movie.like_After: I liked it! Maybe we can go with papa next time.
Muirenn.Movie.dislike_Before: I don't really understand the movie poster, let's see what this is about.$3
Muirenn.Movie.dislike_After: I don't like it...I don't wanna see it again...$2
Muirenn.Toddler.Dialog.Farmhouse.1: %%kid1 is too engrossed to notice you, holding a rather unusually round pebble in her hands.
Muirenn.Toddler.Dialog.Farmhouse.2: I found some worms on the farm today!$1#$b#Papa said I can use them to get fish without going into water...can you show me?$3
Muirenn.Toddler.Dialog.Farmhouse.3: Miss Emily showed me some fun fabric the other day...she said she can make me a dress!
Muirenn.Toddler.Dialog.Farmhouse.4: I asked papa to show me how to cook, but he said something about me having to be at least tall enough to see what is on the stove.$3
Muirenn.Toddler.Dialog.Farmhouse.5: Papa brought some books from the islands library the other day.#$b#He showed me some pictures of grandpa!#$b#Grandpa was huuuuuge!
Muirenn.Toddler.Dialog.Farmhouse.6: When I grow up I want to swim through all the seas!#$b#I bet watching the stars from different places is fun.
Muirenn.Toddler.Dialog.Farmhouse.7: I am sleepy...maybe I will ask papa to take a nap with me.
Muirenn.Toddler.Dialog.Farmhouse.8: Do you think %Kid2 and I can go down to the beach and play in the water?
Muirenn.Toddler.Dialog.Farmhouse.9: Look how much I have grown!#$b#Soon I will reach papa's height!$1
Muirenn.Toddler.Dialog.Farmhouse.10: I collected pebbles today! They're really smooth and feel nice to hold.#$b#Do you want one too?[390]
Muirenn.Festivals.spring13: How many eggs will you collect this time?$1
Muirenn.Festivals.spring24: Do you think I can be the flower queen next year?#$b#I am going to practise really hard!
Muirenn.Festivals.summer11: I like when everyone is celebrating!#$b#Can I throw in something this time?
Muirenn.Festivals.summer28: The light the jellies emmit is really nice.#$b#I like when they sing...hm? You can't hear it?
Muirenn.Festivals.fall16: Can I help you set up this time?#$b#I hope we win!
Muirenn.Festivals.fall27: Did you see Auntie Conny? She dressed up as a Nöck!
Muirenn.Festivals.winter8: Do you want to build a snowman?#$b#It doesn't have to be a snowman.
Muirenn.Festivals.winter25: Gifts are the most fun when you share them! Papa said so himself so I believe it!
